title: cyclosorus × holttumianus
intro: Cyclosorus × holttumianus, also known as Holttum's fern or Holttum's cyclosorus, is a rare hybrid species of fern that is native to Malaysia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds, including flavonoids and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Cyclosorus × holttumianus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may be used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
